data.label: MediaPipe Tasks
data.description: MediaPipe Tasks 提供了 MediaPipe 的核心编程接口解决方案套件，包括一组用于部署创新型机器学习的库构建解决方案，只需极少的代码即可。

data.label: MediaPipe Tasks
data.description: MediaPipe Tasks provides a suite of core programming interface solutions for MediaPipe, including a set of libraries for deploying innovative machine learning solutions with minimal code.
